member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Authentication.Handlers.AuthenticateUserHandler`1
member.summary: MediatR handler that delegates user authentication to the orchestration service.
member.typeparam: The type used for user keys, must implement .

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Authentication.Handlers.ChangePasswordCommandHandler`2
member.summary: MediatR handler that processes password change requests for authenticated users.
member.typeparam: The type representing a user in the system, must inherit from .
The type used for user keys, must implement .

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Authentication.Handlers.ConfirmEmailCommandHandler`2
member.summary: MediatR handler that processes email confirmation requests for users.
member.typeparam: The type representing a user in the system, must inherit from .
The type used for user keys, must implement .

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Authentication.Handlers.ExternalLoginCommandHandler`2
member.summary: Handles external login requests such as Google, Facebook, or Microsoft authentication.
member.typeparam: The application user type.
The user key type.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Authentication.Handlers.ExternalLoginCommandHandler`2.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity.UserManager{`0},Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity.SignInManager{`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The user manager required for external login workflows.
The sign-in manager required for external login workflows.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Authentication.Handlers.ExternalLoginCommandHandler`2.Handle(StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Authentication.Commands.ExternalLoginCommand,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Processes an external login request.
member.param: A token used to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A token response for the authenticated user.
member.exception: Thrown because provider token validation has not yet been implemented.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Authentication.Handlers.ForgotPasswordCommandHandler`2
member.summary: MediatR handler that processes forgot password requests and generates password reset tokens.
member.typeparam: The type representing a user in the system, must inherit from .
The type used for user keys, must implement .

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Authentication.Handlers.LinkExternalLoginCommandHandler`2
member.summary: MediatR handler that processes requests to link an external login provider (e.g., Google, Facebook, Microsoft) to an existing user account.
member.typeparam: The type representing a user in the system, must inherit from .
The type used for user keys, must implement .

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Authentication.Handlers.ResetPasswordCommandHandler`2
member.summary: MediatR handler that processes password reset requests for users.
member.typeparam: The type representing a user in the system, must inherit from .
The type used for user keys, must implement .

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Authentication.Handlers.UnlinkExternalLoginCommandHandler`2
member.summary: MediatR handler that processes requests to unlink an external login provider (e.g., Google, Facebook, Microsoft) from an existing user account.
member.typeparam: The type representing a user in the system, must inherit from .
The type used for user keys, must implement .

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.JwtTokens.Commands.GenerateTokenCommand
member.summary: Command to generate JWT access and refresh tokens for a user.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.JwtTokens.Commands.GenerateTokenCommand.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Command to generate JWT access and refresh tokens for a user.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.JwtTokens.Commands.RefreshTokenCommand
member.summary: Command to refresh JWT tokens using a refresh token.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.JwtTokens.Commands.RefreshTokenCommand.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Command to refresh JWT tokens using a refresh token.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.JwtTokens.Commands.RevokeTokenCommand
member.summary: Command to revoke JWT tokens. Can revoke a specific token or all tokens for a user.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.JwtTokens.Commands.RevokeTokenCommand.Token
member.summary: The specific token to revoke (optional if UserId is provided).

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.JwtTokens.Commands.RevokeTokenCommand.UserId
member.summary: The user ID to revoke all tokens for (optional if Token is provided).

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.JwtTokens.Commands.RevokeTokenCommand.IsRefreshToken
member.summary: Indicates whether the token is a refresh token (true) or access token (false). Only used when Token is provided.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.JwtTokens.Handlers.GenerateTokenCommandHandler`2
member.summary: MediatR handler that processes requests to generate JWT access and refresh tokens for a user.
member.typeparam: The type representing a user in the system, must inherit from .
The type used for user keys, must implement .

member.typeparam: The type representing a user in the system, must inherit from .
The type used for user keys, must implement .

member.summary: Command to create a new user in the system.
member.param: The username for the new user.
The email address for the new user.
The password for the new user (optional if using external authentication).

member.summary: Command to create a new user in the system.
member.param: The username for the new user.

The password for the new user (optional if using external authentication).

member.summary: The email address for the new user.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Users.Commands.CreateUserCommand.Password
